ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the client */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account the client holds */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the client registered with the platform */,
  "address" TEXT /* Client's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Client's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Client's email */,
  "password" TEXT /* Client's password (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who made the transaction */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the transaction occurred */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., BUY, SELL) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per stock in the transaction */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the trend applies to */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "overall_sentiment" TEXT /* Overall market sentiment */,
  "sector_sentiments" TEXT /* Sentiments broken down by sector */,
  "industry_sentiments" TEXT /* Sentiments broken down by industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who set up the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, decrease) */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was set up */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has */,
  "login_credentials" TEXT /* Login credentials for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the prediction is for */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategy" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)
